history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, head-and-shoulders portrait of a young woman with long, wavy, dark brown hair with subtle blonde highlights. Her hair is styled with bangs that fall across her forehead and frame her face, with some strands blowing gently to the side. She has large, expressive dark eyes with winged eyeliner and rosy blush on her cheeks. Her lips are full and painted with a soft pink lipstick. She is wearing a light-colored, ribbed tank top with a delicate pink lace trim visible at the neckline, revealing cleavage. The background is a soft, out-of-focus blue. The lighting is soft and diffused, highlighting her facial features and creating a gentle glow on her skin. The overall mood is intimate and alluring. The color palette is dominated by soft neutrals, pinks, and blues, with the warm tones of her skin and hair creating a focal point. The style is realistic with a touch of glamour.
